LanguageData.Blueprint_ForagingSpot.label: insect enclosure (blueprint)
LanguageData.Blueprint_InsectLoom.label: cocoon silk loom (blueprint)
LanguageData.Blueprint_LeechSpot.label: leech pool (blueprint)
LanguageData.Frame_ForagingSpot.label: insect enclosure (building)
LanguageData.Frame_ForagingSpot.description: This enclosure can house all sorts of insects, they can be coaxed out with different bait.
LanguageData.Frame_InsectLoom.label: cocoon silk loom (building)
LanguageData.Frame_InsectLoom.description: A simple workstation used to turn featherwing cocoons into useable silk.
LanguageData.Frame_LeechSpot.label: leech pool (building)
LanguageData.Frame_LeechSpot.description: A shallow pool for leeches to live in.
